2603.16546.title: DanceHA: A Multi-Agent Framework for Document-Level Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
2603.16546.paper_summary: Aspect-Based Sentiment Intensity Analysis (ABSIA) has garnered increasing attention, though research largely focuses on domain-specific, sentence-level settings. In contrast, document-level ABSIA--particularly in addressing complex tasks like extracting Aspect-Category-Opinion-Sentiment-Intensity (ACOSI) tuples--remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce DanceHA, a multi-agent framework designed for open-ended, document-level ABSIA with informal writing styles. DanceHA has two main components: Dance, which employs a divide-and-conquer strategy to decompose the long-context ABSIA task into smaller, manageable sub-tasks for collaboration among specialized agents; and HA, Human-AI collaboration for annotation. We release Inf-ABSIA, a multi-domain document-level ABSIA dataset featuring fine-grained and high-accuracy labels from DanceHA. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our agentic framework and show that the multi-agent knowledge in DanceHA can be effectively transferred into student models. Our results highlight the importance of the overlooked informal styles in ABSIA, as they often intensify opinions tied to specific aspects.
2603.16546.paper_summary_zh: 基於面向的情感強度分析（ABSIA）引起了越來越多的關注，儘管研究主要集中在特定領域的句子級別設置上。相較之下，文件級別的ABSIA——特別是在處理提取面向-類別-意見-情感-強度（ACOSI）元組等複雜任務時——仍然未被充分探索。在這項工作中，我們介紹了DanceHA，一個旨在處理開放式文件級別ABSIA的多代理框架，適用於非正式寫作風格。DanceHA有兩個主要組件：Dance，採用分而治之的策略，將長上下文的ABSIA任務分解為較小的、可管理的子任務，以便專業代理之間的協作；以及HA，人類與人工智慧的協作進行標註。我們發布了Inf-ABSIA，一個多領域的文件級別ABSIA數據集，具有來自DanceHA的細粒度和高準確度標籤。廣泛的實驗證明了我們的代理框架的有效性，並顯示DanceHA中的多代理知識可以有效地轉移到學生模型中。我們的結果凸顯了在ABSIA中被忽視的非正式風格的重要性，因為它們往往加強了與特定面向相關的意見。
2603.16546.author: Lei Wang et.al.
2603.16546.authors: Lei Wang, Min Huang, Eduard Dragut
